contract_meta.rationale: src/planning/executeSubtask.ts:114-140 relies on context.generateSubtaskOutput(request) via server.ts createPlanExecutionContext (src/server.ts:216-241) which calls generateExecutorOutputFromPrompt (src/server.ts:182-209). On invalid JSON or schema errors, it throws without retry. UI status doc shows subtask failure 'Missing contents for server/index.ts' caused by malformed repair payload (src/repair/multiTurnRepair.ts:145-156 throws). Adding a one-time retry for invalid JSON/schema at subtask generation reduces brittle failures from transient LLM formatting issues and aligns with Phase 4A decomposer retry policy.

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Add a resilient subtask output generator with one retry on invalid JSON or schema validation errors, with clear error reporting.
project.scope: Wrapper for LLM calls, integration in plan context, tests for invalid JSON/schema

actions.cmd: test -f src/planning/executeSubtask.ts && echo exists || echo missing

tasks.title: Win #47: Create resilient generator wrapper
tasks.description: Add generateSubtaskOutput.ts with one retry on JSON parse or schema errors.

exports: export async function generateSubtaskOutputWithRetry(systemPrompt: string, request: SubtaskPromptRequest, enforceTests: boolean, maxAttempts?: number): Promise<ExecutorOutput>
content_spec.logic: Call generateJSON -> parse -> sanitize -> validate; on parse/validation failure retry once with a constrained system instruction; throw with helpful message if still failing

actions.content_spec: Mock generateJSON to first return invalid JSON then valid; assert one retry; assert schema error path

success_criteria: Wrapper retries once on invalid JSON
Throws clear errors when still invalid

tasks.title: Win #48: Integrate wrapper into plan context
tasks.description: Use wrapper in createPlanExecutionContext for subtask generation.

actions.content_spec: Import generateSubtaskOutputWithRetry; in createPlanExecutionContext, set generateSubtaskOutput to wrapper; include 'retry' log via logEvent('plan_progress', ...) when retries occur

tasks.title: Win #49: ExecuteSubtask resilience tests
tasks.description: Add tests ensuring executeSubtask succeeds when first LLM response invalid then valid, and fails with clear notes otherwise.

actions.content_spec: Mock wrapper to simulate invalid->valid; assert status, notes; also test invalid twice path

success_criteria: Subtask tolerates a single invalid response

release_actions.cmd: git commit -m "feat(4B3): resilient subtask output with one retry and tests"

ai_executor_guidelines.win_isolation: Add wrapper and tests before integration
ai_executor_guidelines.phase_specific_guidance: Retry only once to limit drift
